name: Spicy Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup grapes, red or purple, seedless
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the oranges and cut them into sections.
2. Cube the pear.
3. Slice the bananas.
4. Dice the prunes.
5. Cut the grapes in half (if they are large).
6. Toast the walnuts until lightly browned.
7. Combine all the fruits and nuts in a bowl.
